choose.when: SELECT CAST(id AS CHAR) AS id, ST_X(location) AS latitude, ST_Y(location) AS longitude FROM cctv_infos WHERE MBRContains( ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON((${swLat} ${swLng}, ${neLat} ${swLng}, ${neLat} ${neLng}, ${swLat} ${neLng}, ${swLat} ${swLng}))', 4326), location )

SELECT sn AS id, ST_X(location) AS latitude, ST_Y(location) AS longitude FROM security_lights WHERE MBRContains( ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON((${swLat} ${swLng}, ${neLat} ${swLng}, ${neLat} ${neLng}, ${swLat} ${neLng}, ${swLat} ${swLng}))', 4326), location )

SELECT sn AS id, ST_X(location) AS latitude, ST_Y(location) AS longitude FROM street_lights WHERE MBRContains( ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON((${swLat} ${swLng}, ${neLat} ${swLng}, ${neLat} ${neLng}, ${swLat} ${neLng}, ${swLat} ${swLng}))', 4326), location )

SELECT objt_id AS id, ST_X(ST_Transform(ST_SRID(POINT(x, y), 3857), 4326)) AS latitude, ST_Y(ST_Transform(ST_SRID(POINT(x, y), 3857), 4326)) AS longitude FROM security_facilities WHERE x BETWEEN ST_X(ST_Transform(ST_GeomFromText('POINT(${swLat} ${swLng})', 4326), 3857)) AND ST_X(ST_Transform(ST_GeomFromText('POINT(${neLat} ${neLng})', 4326), 3857)) AND y BETWEEN ST_Y(ST_Transform(ST_GeomFromText('POINT(${swLat} ${swLng})', 4326), 3857)) AND ST_Y(ST_Transform(ST_GeomFromText('POINT(${neLat} ${neLng})', 4326), 3857))
choose.otherwise: SELECT CAST(id AS CHAR) AS id, ST_X(location) AS latitude, ST_Y(location) AS longitude FROM cctv_infos WHERE MBRContains( ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON((${swLat} ${swLng}, ${neLat} ${swLng}, ${neLat} ${neLng}, ${swLat} ${neLng}, ${swLat} ${swLng}))', 4326), location )
